texto: As far back as I can remember, there has always been a place to which I belonged with a certainty that nothing has been able to take from me. When I say place, that means less a geographical locality and more a group of people with whom I am connected and to whom I belong.
explicacao: Citação de Sindiwe Magona sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “As far back as I can remember, there has always been a place to which I belonged with a certainty…” articula reflexao, belonging, home em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como home.
